name: Diffrax (JAX Differential Equation Solvers)

agent_readiness.notes: JAX-based numerical differential equation solvers. from diffrax import diffeqsolve, Dopri5, ODETerm. sol = diffeqsolve(ODETerm(f), Dopri5(), t0=0, t1=1, dt0=0.1, y0=y0). ODE, SDE, CDE solvers. Solvers: Euler, Dopri5/8, Heun, Tsit5, Kvaerno5. Fully differentiable through jax.grad. Neural ODEs: train ODE parameters. Adjoint method for memory-efficient gradient computation. Works with equinox for neural ODE models. Academic research tool for scientific ML.

gotchas: Requires JAX knowledge — not a beginner tool
Niche use case — not for general ML
best_when: Neural ODEs (differentiable ODE parameters for ML)
Scientific machine learning requiring ODE/SDE solvers
Research combining differential equations with deep learning
avoid_when: Standard deep learning (equinox/flax without ODE needs)
summary: Diffrax provides JAX differential equation solvers with automatic differentiation. diffeqsolve(ODETerm(f), Dopri5(), t0, t1, dt0, y0) — fully JIT-compilable and differentiable via jax.grad. ODE, SDE, CDE solvers (Euler, Dopri5/8, Tsit5). Adjoint method for memory-efficient gradients. Essential for Neural ODEs and scientific ML in JAX. Pairs with equinox for neural ODE training.
